channel.title: ETOPS on Kayra Sari
channel.description: Recent content in ETOPS on Kayra Sari

item.title: ETOPS: How Twin-Engine Jets Earned the Right to Fly Oceans
item.description: A comprehensive technical examination of Extended-range Twin-engine Operational Performance Standards — tracing the regulatory evolution from the 60-minute rule to ETOPS-370, the engineering requirements that underpin approval, and the future of overwater operations in an era of ultra-long-range twinjets.
